mapper.select: select count(1) > 0 from sys_user_role sur join sys_role sr on sr.id = sur.role_id join sys_role_permission srp on srp.role_id = sr.id join sys_permission sp on sp.id = srp.permission_id where sur.user_id = #{userId} and sur.scope_type = 'GLOBAL' and sur.scope_id is null and sr.scope_type = 'GLOBAL' and sr.deleted = 0 and sr.status = 'ACTIVE' and sp.permission_code = #{permissionCode} and sp.deleted = 0 and sp.status = 'ACTIVE'
